title: Kailasa Kasidre
overview: Deepak's carefree life changes when he falls for Anjali. He and friend Suleman get entangled with a merciless moneylender due to his obsession. Caught by a cop, Deepak must outmaneuver all to rescue Anjali amidst chaos.
